name: Modue Bridge (community)
description: Bridges OpenClaw and the Modue control surface: modue.* RPC relays, modue.bridge.ping for device priming, and 4 LLM tools (modue_leds, modue_display, modue_slider, modue_keys).

enabled.label: Modue Bridge (community)
enabled.help: Register modue.* gateway methods, modue.bridge.ping, and the modue_* agent tools.
